channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: datawhalechina /hello-agents | Python | N/A
item.description: 📚 《从零开始构建智能体》——从零开始的智能体原理与实践教程

item.title: lobehub /lobehub | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

item.title: LearningCircuit /local-deep-research | Python | N/A
item.description: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

item.title: awslabs /aidlc-workflows | Python | N/A
item.description: AI-Driven Life Cycle (AI-DLC) adaptive workflow steering rules for AI coding agents

item.title: CloakHQ /CloakBrowser | Python | N/A
item.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

item.title: decolua /9router | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

item.title: z-lab /dflash | Python | N/A
item.description: DFlash: Block Diffusion for Flash Speculative Decoding

item.title: Hmbown /DeepSeek-TUI | Rust | N/A
item.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

item.title: addyosmani /agent-skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
